executionHistory.summary: Created 6-artifact bug packet from system review finding TR-002. Identified that Telegram webhooks and OAuth callbacks require HTTPS but no reverse proxy documentation exists. Fix: create docs/Deployment.md with Caddy and nginx examples, update architecture doc and README.

Commit 43e93cf: Created docs/Deployment.md (209 lines) with Caddy, nginx, Telegram webhook, OAuth callback, Docker Compose prod override, port exposure sections. README.md links to deployment guide. docs/smackerel.md references deployment guide at two locations.
Documentation-only bug — manual review confirms all 6 Gherkin scenarios satisfied. All config examples use smackerel.example.com. Port 40001 consistent with SST.

Re-verified docs/Deployment.md (6017 bytes) covers Caddy (lines 11-37), nginx + certbot (42-83), Telegram webhook HTTPS (166-176), OAuth callback HTTPS (176-198). All 9 DoD items now checked with inline Evidence.
./smackerel.sh check ran clean (Config is in sync with SST + env_file drift guard: OK). Go config tests pass.
scopes.md DoD now carries 9 inline Evidence entries citing docs/Deployment.md line numbers and README.md/docs/smackerel.md cross-refs; report.md replaced with Validation/Audit Evidence sections.
Bug re-certified done. All 9 DoD items checked with inline Evidence; state promoted to done.
